mapper.select: SELECT date , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(temperature, 0)), 2) AS temperature , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(humidity, 0)), 2) AS humidity , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(speed, 0)), 2) AS speed , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(direction, 0)), 2) AS direction , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(rain, 0)), 2) AS rain , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(sunlight, 0)), 2) AS sunlight , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(pm25, 0)), 2) AS pm25 , ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(pm10, 0)), 2) AS pm10 FROM ${tableName} WHERE date >= #{startDateTime} AND date < #{endDateTime} GROUP BY date LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
